---
title: "CV"
title-block-style: none
pagetitle: "CV | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Curriculum vitae for Dr Mesfin Genie."
page-layout: full
image: /assets/img/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell"><p class="eyebrow">CV</p><h1>Curriculum vitae</h1><p class="lead">A concise web CV and downloadable PDF generated from the same verified source data used across this website.</p><div class="button-row"><a class="button-primary" href="/cv/mesfin-genie-cv.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Download PDF CV</a><button class="button-secondary" type="button" onclick="window.print()">Print this page</button></div></div></header><section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow"><h2>Appointment</h2><p><strong>Continuing Senior Lecturer in Health Economics</strong>, Newcastle Business School, The University of Newcastle, Australia.</p><h2>Education</h2><ul><li>PhD in Economics, Ca’ Foscari University of Venice, Italy, 2019</li><li>MSc in Health Economics and Management, University of Bologna, Italy, 2015</li><li>MSc in Economics, Addis Ababa University, Ethiopia, 2010</li><li>BA in Economics, Jimma University, Ethiopia, 2006</li></ul><h2>Profiles and contact</h2><p><a href="mailto:mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au">Email</a> · <a href="https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">University profile</a> · <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=v2SXM_kAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Google Scholar</a> · <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1744-4666" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">ORCID</a> · <a href="https://github.com/DrGenie" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GitHub</a></p></div></section>
```
